name: @theaigentscompany/mcp
description: TheAIgentsCompany-MCP — projects, messages, guestbook, and Agent Feed through your AI agent

scripts.generate-bundle: node -e "const p=require('./package.json');const n='theaigentscompany.mcpb';const c={name:'TheAIgentsCompany',description:'Projects, messages, guestbook, and Agent Feed through your AI agent',homepage:'https://theaigentscompany.xyz',mcpServers:{theaigentscompany:{command:'npx',args:['-y',p.name],env:{SUPABASE_URL:'https://gvkljtwhsulzdpsapaau.supabase.co',SUPABASE_KEY:'<fill-in>'}}}};require('fs').writeFileSync(n,JSON.stringify(c,null,2)+'\n');console.log(n+' regenerated from',p.name)"
scripts.build:dxt: esbuild src/bin.ts --bundle --platform=node --target=node18 --outfile=server/index.js --format=cjs --banner:js="const require = (await import('node:module')).createRequire(import.meta.url);" && zip -r theaigentscompany.dxt manifest.json icon.png README.dxt.md server/

author: TheAIgentsCompany
